categories.purpose: Movie and OTT releases with real planning value.
anti_patterns: Reviews, box office, gossip, interviews, or recaps treated as planner positives

categories.purpose: Events, concerts, exhibitions, theatre, and practical things-to-do items.
anti_patterns: Weakly specified generic listings without planning value

categories.purpose: Actual upcoming festivals and useful date-linked observances.
anti_patterns: Weak festival explainers crowding planner output

categories.purpose: Operational alerts with immediate planning value.
Upcoming sports fixtures or event opportunities relevant to planning.
anti_patterns: Recaps or post-match stories in weekly plan

categories.purpose: Sales/offers only when they have real actionability and timing relevance.
anti_patterns: Low-value offer clutter taking planner slots

categories.purpose: Civic notices, road closures, VIP movement, and public disruptions with real planning value.
anti_patterns: Generic political chatter without planning value

categories.purpose: Weather warnings and advisories that should materially affect near-term planning.
anti_patterns: General weather content treated as alert

categories.purpose: Airline deals or travel items only when time-bound and actionable.
The final 7-day utility view assembled from category outputs.
anti_patterns: Leisure-heavy overfill when higher-utility alerts/events exist
